kindness.title: Acts of Kindness
kindness.loading: AI is finding the perfect act...
kindness.success_toast: Congratulations! The world is a little bit better.

prompts.random: Suggest a simple and practical act of kindness anyone can do today (1 sentence).
prompts.stranger: Suggest a simple act of kindness to do for a stranger (1 sentence).
prompts.family: Suggest a simple act of kindness to do for family or friends (1 sentence).
prompts.self: Suggest a simple act of self-care or self-compassion (1 sentence).
prompts.work: Suggest a simple act of kindness to do at work or school (1 sentence).

stranger: Sincerely compliment the clothing or accessory of someone you don't know.
Hold the door for someone entering or exiting.
Leave a positive note in a library book or public place.
Smile and greet the bus driver or supermarket cashier.
Pay for the coffee of the person behind you in line (if you can).
family: Call a relative just to tell them you love them.
Do a household chore that isn't your responsibility.
Write a thank you letter to someone who helped you in the past.
Cook the favorite meal of someone in your house.
Actively listen to someone without interrupting or looking at your phone.
self: List 3 things you like about yourself.
Take 15 minutes to do something you love without guilt.
Forgive yourself for a mistake made recently.
Take a mindful walk observing nature.
Write in a journal how you are feeling today.
work: Offer help to a colleague who seems overwhelmed.
Praise someone's work publicly or to the boss.
Bring a snack or sweet to share with the team.
Leave an encouraging post-it on someone's desk.
Thank someone for something specific they did.
